_dissolved_marker.rationale: This runtime-externalization config (authored Plan 80/81 SP01 T-1 to lift hook hardcodes) is superseded by the foundation-master.json bundle-at-load architecture per SP13 spec §Retirement list (Session 1 follow-on). Per OQ-13-4 'migrate-then-drop in same commit' + retirement-order discipline 'gate-config retires LAST gated on T-2 + T-3': T-3 absorbs the remaining runtime slices (r32_type_aliases + r32_exempt_paths + r47_tag_cap) into foundation-master.json top-level slots and migrates hooks to bundle-only reads, leaving this file frozen as backward-compatibility bridge. T-6 (Session 4) handles physical file deletion + pillar-shard destination decisions for the absorbed slices. Mirrors SP13 T-4 vault-schema freeze-with-marker pattern (feedback_freeze_with_marker_retirement_pattern).

canonical_successors.r32.accepted_types (26 values = 21 canon: governance/foundation-master.json#types | keys (21 canonical) + foundation-master.json#r32_type_aliases | keys (5 aliases)
canonical_successors.r32.type_aliases (5 alias→canonical entr: governance/foundation-master.json#r32_type_aliases (interim — T-6 pillar-shard decides final resting; type-registry inversion +1 option locates these under frontmatter-rules.json#types.<canonical>.aliases[])
canonical_successors.r32.exempt_paths (4 R-32 exempt globs): governance/foundation-master.json#r32_exempt_paths (interim — T-6 pillar-shard decides final resting; frontmatter-rules.json is the leading candidate)
canonical_successors.r32.schema_path field: obsoleted by bundle-at-load (hooks no longer need a schema-path indirection; they read foundation-master.json directly)

consumer_migration_status.hooks/pre-write-guard.sh: MIGRATED in SP13 T-3 (this commit) — reads foundation-master.json bundle exclusively
consumer_migration_status.hooks/post-write-verify.sh: MIGRATED in SP13 T-3 (this commit) — reads foundation-master.json bundle exclusively (was also reading vault-schema.json + mandatory-files-rules.json directly; consolidated)
consumer_migration_status.tools/build-foundation-master.sh: READS THIS FILE (interim contributor for r32/r47 slot composition) — dependency drops at T-6 when this file is physically deleted and the absorbed slots either pillar-shard or stay bundle-only
consumer_migration_status.install.sh schema-copy ship list: PENDING SP13 T-6 + T-8 — remove gate-config.json from ship list when physical deletion happens
consumer_migration_status.tests/*: PENDING SP13 T-9 — update fixtures (currently any fixture asserting gate-config presence must be flipped to foundation-master.json equivalents)

_dissolved_marker.policy: (1) No new authoring against this file — all updates go to the named successors. (2) Content below is FROZEN as of 2026-05-14; reads from this file are NOT performed by hooks anymore (T-3 closed direct reads). (3) The file remains present as backward-compatibility bridge for tools/build-foundation-master.sh (interim contributor) until SP13 T-6 retires it physically. (4) The governance/_index.json `dissolved_schemas` registry tracks final-deletion gating.

_provenance: Authored Plan 80/81 SP01 T-1 on 2026-05-07. Verbatim lift from ~/.claude/hooks/pre-write-guard.sh hardcoded values. R-32 source: lines 803-863 + 1052-1069. R-47 source: lines 933-972 + 1073 (tag prefix grammar). R-37 source: line 25 + packet §3.3. NO semantic changes — pure externalization. Behavior-preserving validation deferred to T-16 fixture corpus + T-6 refactor. DISSOLVED SP13 T-3 2026-05-14: hooks no longer read this file directly; absorbed slices live in foundation-master.json. See _dissolved_marker block above.

r32._schema_path_note: Live hook resolves SCHEMA_FILE = SCHEMAS_DIR/vault-schema.json where SCHEMAS_DIR = $CLAUDE_HOME/schemas (per ~/.claude/hooks/lib/paths.sh:18). Authoritative runtime path. Foundation-repo authoring lives at ~/Code/claude-stem/schemas/vault-schema.json (16 schemas; superset of live's 3) and Phase A bootstrap discipline syncs foundation-repo → live $CLAUDE_HOME/schemas/ as part of deploy ceremony — gate-config.json ALWAYS resolves to live runtime path, never foundation-repo path.
r32._accepted_types_note: 26 values (21 canonical schema keys from vault-schema.json + 5 aliases). Live hook comment at pre-write-guard.sh:849 says '25 accepted values: 20 canonical + 5 aliases' — comment is off by 1 vs reality (canonical count is 21, not 20). T-6 refactor preserves the 26-value reality, not the comment.
r32._exempt_paths_note: Sub-folder CLAUDE.md exempt EXCEPT Engagements/*/CLAUDE.md (T4 navigation enforcement). Live hook lines 742-748 carry this carve-out; v1 retains it via case-statement equivalent at refactor time. Glob patterns documented above are vault-relative; refactor honors original prefix-match semantics (REL_PATH != Logs/librarian-manifest*).

r47._tag_dimensions_note: 8-dimension list per vault CLAUDE.md §Tagging Taxonomy. Same prefix grammar single-sourced for: (a) R-47 Tier 1 advisory at pre-write-guard.sh:971, (b) R-32 Tier 2 DENY tag-conformance check at pre-write-guard.sh:1073. SP01 lifts both consumers to read this same array.
r47._exempt_paths_note: Plan 67 SP03 T-3 positive-list semantics (2026-04-22). Verbatim lift from pre-write-guard.sh:946-965 case statement. Vault-relative globs.

r37._enforcement_action_note: v1 ships in shadow-mode warn-only for the 7-day SP01 cutover soak. Promotes to deny on zero unjustified divergences. Per packet §3.8 + success criterion 6.

coupled_surfaces.name: vault-schema-add
coupled_surfaces._provenance: pre-write-guard.sh:849-852 deny-message acknowledges this 4-surface lockstep as the failure mode that justified R-32 Tier 1 → Tier 2 promotion (P4-T01 2026-04-17). Adding new vault types without all four = drift class R-37 promotion guards against.

coupled_surfaces.name: connector-schema-add
coupled_surfaces._provenance: SP07 §3.7 5-surface lockstep. Canonical R-37 Option α use case per packet §3.17. Note: tests/sp07/ + docs/connectors-schema.md are SP07-build-time artifacts; coupled-set declared now to assert lockstep discipline at SP07 land time.

coupled_surfaces.name: enforcement-map-row
coupled_surfaces._provenance: ENFORCEMENT-MAP rows must always cross-reference CLAUDE.md (R-XX paragraph) and vice versa. Drift between the two is the documentation-rot class R-37 closes.

r37._override_sentinel_note: Mirrors existing G2 denylist sentinel pattern. Touch + git commit --no-verify required (two physical actions). Logged in audit trail (gate-decisions.log). Per packet §3.6.
